since_last: 36% of 84 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.84%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 36% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.41% · BTC -0.37% · Gold -0.08% · Nasdaq100 -1.61%. 36% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.84%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.84%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -4.21%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at -10.41%
cards.body: Leaders: NET +7.74%, ADBE +4.91%, NOW +4.44%, DDOG +3.94%, WDAY +3.72%. Laggards: TER -10.41%, INTC -9.31%, AMBA -8.82%, AMAT -7.73%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -5.24% at $152.02
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -5.24% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
